title: clicknpark partners with ParkChamp to redefine smart parking across Canada
content:
## clicknpark partners with ParkChamp to redefine smart parking across Canada
On September 16, 2025, clicknpark, a Canadian leader in smart parking solutions, acquired ParkChamp, a Calgary-based parking technology company serving thousands of users and managed spaces across Western Canada. This acquisition combines clicknpark’s and ParkChamp’s expertise in parking technologies to deliver Canada’s first truly national smart parking solution. The acquisition strengthens clicknpark’s national footprint and supports its goal of building Canada’s first coast-to-coast smart parking platform.
McCarthy Tétrault LLP advised clicknpark with a team led by Louis-Charles Filiatrault and Guillaume Giguère that included Francis Langlois and Samantha Morel (Corporate and M&A), Eugen Miscoi (Privacy), Jerry Lan (IP), and Stephanie Henry (Labour and Employment).
